name: txtsplit

metadata.name: txtsplit
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: A simple text splitter based on Tortoise for use in text-to-speech applications

documentation:
# txtsplit

[Tortoise TTS](https://github.com/neonbjb/tortoise-tts)'s text splitter, repackaged. All credit goes to the author of Tortoise TTS.

## Installation

```
pip install txtsplit
```

(0 dependencies)

## Usage

```python
from txtsplit import txtsplit
print(txtsplit("Long text", desired_length=100, max_length=200))
```

## License & Credits

Most of the code was taken from [Tortoise TTS](https://github.com/neonbjb/tortoise-tts).

Apache 2.0, like Tortoise TTS.

functions.name: txtsplit.txtsplit
documentation: Split text it into chunks of a desired length trying to keep sentences intact.
